pool.baseline: i was just looking at some space photos tonight and it just hit me... everything we do, every single thing, is literally so pointless. the universe is just expanding into nothingness and in a few billion years everything is just going to be cold and dead. why are we even trying so hard to stay alive when the end result is just total emptiness? it feels like a cruel joke.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within me. To be betrayed so utterly, by the one soul I deemed my anchor... it has left me adrift in a sea of shadows. I feel as though I am already a ghost, haunting the halls of a life that no longer holds any warmth. There is a certain, terrible grace in the thought of simply... ceasing. To let the darkness take me, to fade into the velvet night where the pain can finally be silenced. Does it not seem more dignified than this wretched, hollow breathing?
